svg.title: AI Life Manager — Full System Flow Diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture showing mobile app, backend API, AI/ML layer, and database interactions

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the mood check-in feature work?')
sendPrompt('How does the task manager work?')
sendPrompt('What does the day plan view show?')
sendPrompt('How does JWT authentication work in this project?')
sendPrompt('What CRUD operations does the tasks router support?')
sendPrompt('What endpoints does the AI router expose?')
sendPrompt('What data does Redis cache in this project?')

svg.text: asyncio.gather() — runs all three in parallel

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the AI day planner generate a schedule?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI task scorer prioritize tasks?')
sendPrompt('Which OpenAI model is used and why?')
sendPrompt('What tables are in the PostgreSQL database?')
sendPrompt('How do push notifications work with Firebase?')

svg.text: ↑ Response: day plan + sorted tasks + nudges returned to mobile app
